locations.name: School Hallway
descriptions: A busy hallway with student lockers lining the walls
Posters and notices cover the bulletin boards

locations.name: Teacher's Office
descriptions: A small office filled with teaching materials and student work
Books and papers are organized on shelves
A comfortable chair sits behind a wooden desk

items.name: Homework Assignment
descriptions: A completed homework assignment neatly written
The student worked hard on this assignment

characters.name: Ms. Rodriguez
descriptions: A dedicated teacher with a friendly demeanor
She reviews student work at her desk
Her expression is warm and encouraging

player.name: Sarah
descriptions: Her face shows a mix of responsibility and relief
